rbaHistory.note: First cut since Nov 2020 — CPI back in 2-3% band
Held; trimmed mean CPI above target
Held; Q1 CPI surprised to upside

news.title: ASX falls as tech stocks decline; Energy stocks rise, A2 tanks
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket  closed lower after Donald Trump’s vow to blockade the Strait of Hormuz, which sent oil prices soaring and reignited fears for the global economy.

news.title: Trump move rocks Aussie sharemarket
news.snippet: Gold miners and tech stocks have dragged the ASX 200 down, but oil has soared after US President Donald Trump ordered a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.

news.title: Beetaloo locks in $66.3M to fast-track to first NT gas
news.snippet: Beetaloo Energy has banked $66.3M and locked in a fully funded runway to first pilot gas this year, fast-tracking its Carpentaria project and broader Beetaloo Basin growth push.

news.title: Dalaroo lists on OTCQB market to meet US Greenland rare earths demand
news.snippet: Dalaroo is now quoted in the US on the OTCQB under the ticker DALMF, giving North American traders a US-dollar line into its gold and critical minerals playbook.

news.title: Albo flags move on controversial Aussie tax
news.snippet: Anthony Albanese has given the strongest indication yet Labor could seek to scrap a controversial housing tax break at next month’s budget.

news.title: Dreaded number that could start a recession
news.snippet: Almost one million Aussies could be jobless, inflation may almost double and two sectors face being decimated if the price of oil spikes to a certain figure.

news.title: Who says money can’t buy happiness? Meet the unabashedly happy Mrs Sánchez Bezos
news.snippet: As half of an unfathomably powerful couple, Amazon founder Jeff Bezos’ wife, Lauren Sánchez Bezos, seems to have influenced the uber-rich to stop apologising, and start enjoying themselves.

news.title: IKEA winds back its famous 365-day refund policy
news.snippet: The Swedish furniture giant’s refund policy has been wound back to 60 days for Australian consumers to “minimise misuse”.

news.title: ‘Early stages’: Ray Dalio’s chilling WW3 warning as he outlines 13 steps to a global conflict
news.snippet: A billionaire hedge fund manager has warned the escalating conflict in the Middle East could spiral into a “world war” scenario, in an unsettling note to investors.

news.title: Critical fires up hunt for hidden lithium in Canada
news.snippet: Critical Resources is launching a lithium exploration blitz at Corona in Canada, targeting hidden spodumene across a 5km trend to add to its Mavis Lake resource base.

news.title: Day rues missed opportunities after golden chance at the Masters
Shocking numbers show major housing issue
news.snippet: The great Australian dream of owning a home is slipping further out of reach with house prices in major cities set to rise even more this year.
